# L3 override prose (with-md fixture)

This file overrides plugin prose for one rule. Used by case (c).

## U001

**Summary:** Project-specific U001 prose override — sentinel string `PROJECT_L3_PROSE_OVERRIDE_U001`.

**Why:** This file replaces plugin prose for U001 at the L3 layer; the merge should preserve all other rules' plugin prose.

**Static tools:** `grep`
